title: 2 x Anti-Glare Replacement Covers for Snap Poster Frames and A-Board Pavement Signs A5 (148mm x 210mm)
features: Suited to fit A-Board Signs and Snap Frames
description: These anti-glare replacement covers are sold in packs of 2. Our anti-glare replacement poster covers are suitable to fit all of our a-board pavement signs and our snap frames. These poster covers are designed to keep your posters looking professional; they are simply slotted on top of the poster and locked in place with the snap frame mechanism on the A-board or snap frame unit. They are also UV protected preventing them from changing colours when placed in direct sunlight. *Please note, this product is a non-refundable. Please ensure the right size has been ordered and for the correct purpose*
